title: Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Mini Roller Set 4in | Kit Includes: Tray, Roller Frame, 2 x Gloss Roller Sleeves 4"
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Mini Roller Set - 4" Tray, Roller Frame & 2 x Gloss Roller Sleeves What's Included Contents 1 x 4" Harris Tray Roller Frame 2 x Gloss Roller Sleeves Doing a Project Seriously Good Woodwork Mini Roller Set Our 4" Seriously Good Mini Roller Set gives a great lint free finish with less mess when painting larger flat areas such as living room skirting boards, banisters, doors, furniture and more. The rollers work fantastically with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results follow manufacturers care instructions. Don't forget... To get the same paint finish, match this roller set with our range of Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Paint Brushes. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
